---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new command, workflow, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added and how it should work.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature and why?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups that might help explain this feature request.

## Relevant Obsidian CLI Commands

If applicable, link to the relevant [Obsidian CLI documentation](https://help.obsidian.md/Obsidian/Command+line+interface) for the underlying commands.
